Could this day get any better?
I am wet, you are wetter
Sitting together in the bath
Telling jokes, enjoying a laugh
I pull my lips close to you
I see you do it too

title: Love Sonnet
content:
The beauty for which I live
Is the sparkle of your eye.
To see it once, I would give
My heart, my soul, live and die.

To spend a moment with you
And catch glance of your smile,
I would give all that ...

title: Sgian Dubh
content:
